search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

input.label: Sparing Policy

choice.value: eval isSpare = if(like(ProductFamily, "%IP Phone%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%VG% Series Gateways%"), 1, 0)
eval isSpare = if(like(ProductFamily, "%IP Phone%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%VG% Series Gateways%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco Aironet%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Access Points%"), 1, 0)

eval isSpare = if(like(ProductFamily, "%IP Phone%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%VG% Series Gateways%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco Aironet%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Access Points%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 2%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 3%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 92%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 93%"), 1, 0)

eval isSpare = if(like(ProductFamily, "%IP Phone%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%VG% Series Gateways%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco Aironet%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Access Points%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 2%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 3%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 92%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Catalyst 93%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Fabric Extenders%"), 1, 0)

input.choice: AP's, Phones, VG's, Access Switches & FEX's
input.default: eval isSpare = if(like(ProductFamily, "%IP Phone%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%VG% Series Gateways%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco Aironet%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Access Points%"), 1, 0)
input.initialValue: eval isSpare = if(like(ProductFamily, "%IP Phone%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%VG% Series Gateways%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco Aironet%") OR like(ProductFamily, "%Access Points%"), 1, 0)

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:asset" physicalAssetType="Chassis") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:contractserial") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflifebulletin") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") | fields sourcetype deviceId deviceName productFamily physicalAssetId productId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName softwareVersion coveredProductLineEndDate isCovered endOfServiceContractRenewalDate | eventstats max(coveredProductLineEndDate) as coveredProductLineEndDate, max(isCovered) as ContractStatus by serialNumber | eventstats max(endOfServiceContractRenewalDate) as eoSCR by productId | eventstats values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | search sourcetype="cisco:bcs:asset" | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId physicalAssetId | rename physicalAssetType as EquipmentType, productFamily as ProductFamily | where EquipmentType="Chassis" | fillnull value="Not Active" ContractStatus | eval chassisNoContract = if(ContractStatus!="true" AND EquipmentType="Chassis", 1, 0) | rex field=eoSCR mode=sed "s/T.*$//g" | fillnull value="null" eoSCR | eval timeEoSCR = strptime(eoSCR, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval serviceQuotable = if(eoSCR="null" OR now()<timeEoSCR, 1, 0) | $singleLineGroupSelector$
| stats count as Initialize | eval AddHeader="Cover" | table AddHeader

| loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search chassisNoContract=1 AND ProductFamily!="*3rd Party*" AND ProductFamily!="UNCLASSIFIED" AND ProductFamily!="Unclassified" AND serviceQuotable=1 | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=0 | stats count as Chassis2Add

single.option: Not Spared, Not Covered, Service Orderable

panel.title: NCA: Add - Chassis by Product Family

search.query: | loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search chassisNoContract=1 AND ProductFamily!="*3rd Party*" AND ProductFamily!="UNCLASSIFIED" AND ProductFamily!="Unclassified" AND serviceQuotable=1 | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=0 | stats count as Chassis2Add by ProductFamily | sort -Chassis2Add | head 10

| loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search chassisNoContract=1 AND ProductFamily!="*3rd Party*" AND ProductFamily!="UNCLASSIFIED" AND ProductFamily!="Unclassified" AND serviceQuotable=1 | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=0 | stats count as Chassis2Add by ProductFamily | sort -Chassis2Add
| stats count as Initialize | eval AddHeader="Cancel" | table AddHeader
| loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search ContractStatus="true" | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=1 | stats count as Chassis2Cancel

panel.title: NCA: Cancel - Chassis by Product Family

search.query: | loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search ContractStatus="true" | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=1 | stats count as Chassis2Cancel by productId | sort -Chassis2Cancel | head 10
| loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search ContractStatus="true" | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=1 | stats count as Chassis2Cancel by productId | sort -Chassis2Cancel
| stats count as Init | eval subTitle="Download" | table subTitle

| loadjob $base_chassis_coverage_sid$ | search chassisNoContract=1 AND ProductFamily!="*3rd Party*" AND ProductFamily!="UNCLASSIFIED" AND ProductFamily!="Unclassified" AND serviceQuotable=1 | $isSpareInit$ | search isSpare=0 | table deviceId, physicalAssetId, deviceName, serialNumber, productId, ProductFamily, eoSCR, ContractStatus, coveredProductLineEndDate
